title: Veal Parm in the Capital District
tagline: Community-researched map of veal parm in the capital district

intent.statement: Capture verified veal parmesan destinations in the Capital District with evidence tied to the specific product rather than generic restaurant listings.
intent.scope: Capital District municipalities within the declared coordinate bounds.
intent.photoPolicy: Prefer verified product images that clearly show veal parm preparation and plating.

intentHistory.author: codex
intentHistory.summary: Added intent and evidence policy so enrichment runs can preserve product-level focus.
